title: PRTS UI Optimization
description: Frontend-backend alignment, deprecated code removal, and UI optimization

stories.title: API Standards Documentation
acceptanceCriteria: docs/api-standards.md exists with error format (code, message, details, trace_id)
Pagination standard documented (cursor, has_more, limit)
Success response format documented (data, meta with timestamp/trace_id)
API versioning strategy documented with migration plan

stories.title: Flutter Error Handling
acceptanceCriteria: ApiException has details (Map) and traceId (String?) fields
error_mapper.dart maps VALIDATION_ERROR, NOT_FOUND, UNAUTHORIZED
ApiService implements exponential backoff (3 retries: 1s, 2s, 4s)

stories.title: Component Library Setup
acceptanceCriteria: lib/widgets/common/ directory exists with README.md
app_theme.dart defines tokens: colors (primary/error/success), spacing (xs/s/m/l/xl), radius (s/m/l)

stories.title: Core UI Components
acceptanceCriteria: AppButton with loading state and variants (primary/secondary/text)
AppTextField with validation and error display
AppCard with padding variants (none/small/medium/large)
AppLoadingIndicator with optional message
AppErrorView with retry button
AppEmptyState with icon/message/action
Widget tests for AppButton loading and AppTextField validation

stories.title: Flutter Data Models
acceptanceCriteria: AgentSession model with fromJson/toJson (id, agentId, title, createdAt, updatedAt)
Artifact model with fromJson/toJson (id, sessionId, type, title, content, status, createdAt)
PromptTemplate model with fromJson/toJson (key, name, content, variables)
AIAgent model updated to match agent_chat_store.go:29-40 schema

stories.title: Provider Configuration API
acceptanceCriteria: getProviderStatus() returns Map with provider status
getDefaultAgentProvider() returns default provider name
updateProviderConfig() accepts config Map and returns success

stories.title: Prompt Templates API
acceptanceCriteria: listPromptTemplates() returns List<PromptTemplate>
updatePromptTemplate() updates and returns PromptTemplate
reloadPromptTemplates() triggers reload and returns success

stories.title: Agent Sessions API
acceptanceCriteria: getAIAgentSessions() returns List<AIAgentSession> with pagination (limit, cursor)
createAIAgentSession() creates session with optional title
deleteAIAgentSession() deletes session and returns success

stories.title: Session Artifacts API
acceptanceCriteria: listSessionArtifacts() returns List<Artifact> with status filter
importQuestionsFromArtifact() imports questions and returns result Map
importPlanFromArtifact() imports plan and returns result Map

stories.title: Session Operations API
acceptanceCriteria: compressSessionMessages() compresses history with optional targetCount
confirmSessionAction() confirms agent action and returns result Map

stories.title: Course Schedule Lessons API
acceptanceCriteria: getCourseScheduleLessons() returns List<CourseLesson> with date/granularity filters
createCourseScheduleLesson() creates and returns CourseLesson
updateCourseScheduleLesson() updates and returns void
deleteCourseScheduleLesson() deletes lesson and returns void

stories.title: Provider Configuration UI
acceptanceCriteria: Settings screen has AI Provider section with API key, model, temperature fields
Form validates API key format and temperature range (0-1)
Provider status indicator shows connected/disconnected badge

stories.title: Session Artifacts UI
acceptanceCriteria: Agent chat screen has Chat and Artifacts tabs
Artifacts list view displays artifacts grouped by type with filtering
Artifact preview dialog shows content with import buttons
Import actions handle questions/plan import with success/error messages

stories.title: Course Schedule Lessons UI
acceptanceCriteria: Course schedule screen shows Manage Lessons button and lessons list
Create lesson dialog with form (title, description, date, duration)
Edit lesson dialog pre-populates form and updates on submit
Delete lesson shows confirmation dialog and refreshes list

stories.title: Legacy Agent Migration
acceptanceCriteria: All /agents endpoint usage documented
Flutter migrated to /ai/agents endpoints
Legacy /agents endpoints return X-Deprecated: true header
Test checklist passes: create (201), start session (201), send message (200), view history (200), delete (204→404)
API docs updated with deprecation notice and timeline

stories.title: Data Migration Preparation
acceptanceCriteria: 036_consolidate_agents.sql creates agents_backup and agent_chat_history_backup tables, then migrates to ai_agents
Chat history migrated to ai_session_messages with correct associations
036_consolidate_agents_rollback.sql drops ai_* tables, restores from backups, verifies counts

stories.title: Migration Execution
acceptanceCriteria: Production database backup created and verified readable
Migration tested on staging with data integrity verified and report approved
Migration executed in production with monitoring
Verification queries pass: agent count matches, message count matches, zero orphaned sessions, all names preserved

stories.title: Backend Cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: internal/modules/agent/ directory deleted
Agent module not registered in bootstrap/app.go
Legacy /agents routes not registered in router.go
Migration created to drop agents and agent_chat_history tables
go test ./... passes

stories.title: Flutter Cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: ai_tutor_team.dart deleted with no import errors
ai_tutor_team_controller.dart assessed and decision documented
Unused imports removed from api_service.dart
flutter analyze shows no errors or warnings

stories.title: Prompt Template Management UI
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt templates screen displays all templates with search
Template detail view shows content with markdown preview and variable highlighting
Template editor allows markdown editing and saves changes
Reload button triggers template reload from disk with success message

stories.title: Enhanced Chat UI
acceptanceCriteria: Chat screen has message compression button in app bar with confirmation dialog
Action confirmation UI displays action details with confirm/reject buttons
Message search bar filters messages by text and highlights results

stories.title: Additional UI Components
acceptanceCriteria: AppDialog component with title, content, and action buttons
AppBottomSheet component with custom content and drag to dismiss

stories.title: User Flow Optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Practice session flow reduced from 4 to 3 screens
Progress indicator shows current question number and total (e.g., '3 of 10')
Quick retry button appears after incorrect answer
Skeleton screens show placeholders while loading list views

stories.title: OpenAPI Specification
acceptanceCriteria: docs/openapi.yaml exists with valid OpenAPI 3.0 structure
All /ai/* endpoints documented with request/response schemas and examples
All active endpoints documented (questions, practice, plans, mistakes, etc.)
Error codes documented in components/schemas with descriptions

stories.title: Migration Guides and Documentation
acceptanceCriteria: migration-agent-consolidation.md documents /agents to /ai/agents migration with code examples
Database migration process documented with backup, migration, rollback procedures
README.md updated with current architecture and component library info
Flutter client README.md documents new components and API methods with usage examples
developer-onboarding.md allows new developers to set up project from guide
All public APIs have JSDoc/Dartdoc comments
